三位长辈，七个哥哥，于一天内战死，尊荣加身的北境少主，沦为欺辱的对象。

想欺我，不知道我有‘全能词条系统’？

一个任务，就能获得各类职业卡、武技卡、天赋卡、经验卡、体验卡。

天赋不够。

金色传说级，可够？红色神话级，可够？

职业不够？

一张职业卡，开启一种异能，可够？

修为不够？

一张经验卡，直升七阶战神，可够？

血脉不够？

七阶炼丹师在此，杀怪炼丹便是。

世家少主身份尊贵，本少爷是八阶‘时间系’异能师，够打你不？

仙门少主天赋异禀，本少爷有九阶‘空间系’体验卡，够打你不？

什么，你要开战？

本少爷麾下，每一个人都是异能师、控制师、辅助师、治疗师、炼丹师、预言师、御兽师、阵法师，确定吗？

只问你，确定吗？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/72e4ddac7ac05a20f4d37dc0a5acbcfa","author":"落叶飞羽","author_id":"","book_id":"7474515580263861310","book_name":"高武：开局觉醒全能词条系统","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303030","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3004人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":514,"name":"灵气复苏","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=514&name=灵气复苏&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":856,"name":"全能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=856&name=全能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7474515613222699582","read_count":"3004","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"704970"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.9","serial_count":"414","tags":"都市高武,都市,系统,天才,灵气复苏,全能","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/e94a88bffbe6e399747dbd643f01b450~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779435230&x-signature=LZbuQ31g4jGB6fsZsV6aln3yb54%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2735182595491896","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"11"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323153350FC163489C03CB2DB3652"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration"
